method: For each V0.1 record's candidate absolute years (from resolveSolarDateForLunar), the corresponding calendar day page was fetched live (rate-limited, 1 req/20s per source-access-policy.v0.2.json) and cross-checked on lunar month/day, yin/yang, gender, displayed Mệnh score and displayed whole-chart total. A record is 'recovered' only when all captured fields agree exactly — text stem-branch labels are not trusted alone (see the 1994-05-20 lunar-date edge case in source-access-review.md).
notAttemptedReason: Session fetch budget — each candidate requires a live, rate-limited request; only a small subset was attempted this pass to prove the methodology end-to-end. Tooling (checkV01RecoveryCandidate) is reusable for the remaining 16 in a follow-up pass.

recovered.note: Two independent WebFetch passes of https://tuvi.cohoc.net/lich-la-so-tu-vi-ngay-1-2-1997.html agreed exactly on all four numeric fields (lunar month 12, lunar day 24, Mệnh 0.25, whole-chart total 7.09) plus gender/yin-yang. This is machine-diff-verified, not human-double-entry-verified — see limitations.md.

ambiguousOrMismatched.note: The live calendar page only exposed the male ('Dương Nam') row for all 12 hours (HK-PUB-001 is 'Dương Nữ'/female), and its own stated lunar day (10) differs from the engine's candidate (11) — a real new-moon-boundary edge case, not a recovery. The other candidate year for this record (1934-05-23) was not attempted this pass.
